headline: Interactive Brokers, Charles Schwab Slide Despite Earnings Surge
summary: Interactive Brokers earnings and Charles Schwab earnings both beat estimates for the second quarter on Tuesday, as volatile markets drove higher trading volume. Both SCHW stock and IBKR stock fell near buy points on Wednesday.

raw.headline: Interactive Brokers, Charles Schwab Slide Despite Earnings Surge

headline: The Age of Free ETF Trades Is Ending
summary: Brokerages like Fidelity and Charles Schwab are charging ETF firms to place their products on their platforms. individual investors will ultimately bear the costs.

headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Launches Bitcoin And Ethereum Trading After Record Revenue
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) reports record quarterly revenue and earnings. The company introduces direct Bitcoin and Ethereum trading for its retail clients. The new crypto offering sits alongside Schwab's existing brokerage, advisory, and banking services. Charles Schwab sits at the center of U.S. retail investing, with brokerage, advisory, and banking products that many investors already use for stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, and cash management. The record revenue and earnings highlight a...
